rationale: Educ. Code §37.313 addresses conflicts between subchapters on safety and security requirements for facilities. It has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: To the extent of any conflict between a provision of this subchapter and a provision of Subchapter A, this subchapter prevails.
_note: Rule text concerns school facility safety subchapter conflict resolution; unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
